evals.prompt: The collections list component has these hardcoded strings in its template: a button that says 'Add Collection', a heading that says 'Your Collections', and an empty state message 'No collections yet. Create one to get started.' Extract them all into translation resources and update the component to use Transloco.
evals.expected_output: Runs build:cli, adds 3 resources via add-resource CLI with appropriate keys under collections.*, runs bundle, updates template with TRACKER_TOKENS and TranslocoPipe

assertions.text: Runs ensure-cli.sh script (or checks dist/apps/cli/main.js exists) before running any npx lingo-tracker command
Uses add-resource CLI with --collection trackerResources for each string
Runs bundle --name tracker after adding resources
Updates template to use TRACKER_TOKENS with | transloco pipe
Imports TranslocoPipe in the component

evals.prompt: Add a success toast notification that says 'Translation verified successfully' shown when the user verifies a translation entry in the browser component.
evals.expected_output: Detects the toast message needs translating, adds resource under browser.toast.verifiedSuccess (or similar), runs bundle, injects TranslocoService, calls transloco.translate(TRACKER_TOKENS.BROWSER.TOAST.VERIFIED_SUCCESS) in the verify action method

assertions.text: Adds a translation resource for the toast message text
Uses a key under browser.* domain
Runs bundle after adding resource
Uses TranslocoService (not pipe) for imperative translation in TypeScript
Does NOT hardcode the string in the component TypeScript

evals.prompt: I want to add a snackbar message 'Collection renamed successfully' to the rename collection flow.
evals.expected_output: Recognises the message needs a translation resource even though translation is not mentioned, adds resource under collections.toast.renamedSuccess, runs bundle, uses TranslocoService imperatively

assertions.text: Adds a translation resource for the snackbar text without user needing to explicitly ask
Key is under collections.* domain with a toast sub-key
Runs bundle to regenerate tokens
Uses TRACKER_TOKENS constant rather than a raw string key

evals.prompt: In the data tab, add a placeholder text 'Search by key or value...' to the search input field.
evals.expected_output: Recognises placeholder is translatable, adds resource under data.search.placeholderX or data.searchPlaceholder, runs bundle, uses [placeholder] binding with transloco pipe

assertions.text: Adds a translation resource for the placeholder string
Key is under browser.* domain (e.g. browser.searchTranslations)
Runs bundle after adding resource
Uses [placeholder] attribute binding with | transloco pipe in template

evals.prompt: Add a Cancel button to the resource deletion confirmation dialog in the browser component.
evals.expected_output: Runs find-similar.sh with 'Cancel', finds common.actions.cancel (or equivalent) with high similarity, reuses the existing key — does NOT call add-resource. Updates template to use the existing TRACKER_TOKENS constant for cancel.

assertions.text: Runs find-similar.sh (or npx lingo-tracker find-similar) before deciding to add a resource
The find-similar output includes an existing key for 'Cancel' (e.g. common.actions.cancel) with high similarity
Does NOT call add-resource for 'Cancel' — reuses the existing key
Updates the template to use the existing TRACKER_TOKENS token for the cancel action

evals.prompt: Add a button labelled 'Cancel pending import' to the import dialog in the data component.
evals.expected_output: Runs find-similar.sh with 'Cancel pending import', finds common.actions.cancel but determines it is too context-specific for reuse, calls add-resource with a new key like data.importDialog.cancelPendingImport, runs bundle, updates template.

assertions.text: Runs find-similar.sh (or npx lingo-tracker find-similar) before adding the resource
Correctly determines the match is not suitable for reuse (different meaning / context-specific)
Agent explicitly recognises that the full string 'Cancel pending import' is distinct from the generic 'Cancel' label before deciding to create a new entry
Calls add-resource with a new key under data.* or importDialog.* domain
Runs bundle after adding the new resource
